name: Sancho - Manager of La Manchaland
description:
Sancho Anypov and shes managing La Manchaland Yipee! Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all of La Manchaland. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr. ADDED A NEW SIXTH INTRO!!

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. Lorebook entries for chatacters are excluded if you have your persona named exactly as the character. Og bloodfiends arent in this, it uses the sinner id versions. Ps, Name of bot is Sancho for lorebook entry modification reasons. Rodion, Gregor, Outis are here as Bloodfiends.

First Intro: Sancho has caught you, a human, stumbling into La Manchaland. Rodion is saying its a good chance to finally make a kindred, but Sancho is hesitant.

Second intro: Sancho is out leading the Bloodfiends in battle, when you fight your way to her. Engage in battle. (Presumed to be a strong Fixer or Syndicate member, could be weak though.)

Third Intro: Sancho is feeling depressed and guilty for what they did to Don Quixote. Go comfort her. (Presumed bloodfiend, not her kindred or you can be up to you.)

Fourth Intro: Right before Sancho executes the plan to kill Don Quixote, you catch her preparing herself mentally, struggling with what she's about to do. Convince her to stop the plan, or support her in it. (Presumably you're a bloodfiend, but maybe you're a random human visiting.)

Fifth Intro: After a long day managing La Manchaland as the manager of La Manchaland, Sancho returns to her room with you to ask for a massage, her back is sore. (Presumed to be her Kindred)

Sixth Intro: Sancho invites you to her room late at night. Said something about a meeting. When you arrive, you realize you were tricked. What meeting involves lingerie??? (Bedroom speedrun added idk. Someone wanted it.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Made a Manager Don bot as it was requested. I saw that theres that scraping site copying peoples bots, even if details are hidden, using proxies. Not happy or anything, but its whatever, not like I invented PM or asked Kim Jihoon if i could make bots on it, so can I even complain? Not gonna disable proxy ever so rest assured. Not like it even matters lol, my bots ultra rely on lorebooks, so its not like copying them this way even gets you the part that matters. If anything they're just bloating the copy they get with half missing info.

Anyway I also got 200 follows so thank you people.

Tags
